hooks.command: git fetch origin && git rebase origin/main

echo "{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Recent commits:
$(git log --oneline -5)

Changed files vs origin/main:
$(git diff --name-only origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A')"}}"
docker compose ps --format json 2>/dev/null | grep -q db || echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠ DB 컨테이너가 실행 중이 아닙니다. make db를 실행하세요."}'
